title: Global Market: European shares steady, set for weekly loss as oil surge, earnings keep investors cautious - The Economic Times
text:
European shares remained flat as investors assessed rising oil prices. Escalating Middle East tensions and corporate earnings influenced market sentiment. Germany's DAX gained, boosted by strong results from software firm SAP. Energy stocks declined after Neste's profit missed market expectations.
